channel.title: H. Ishak on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in H. Ishak on LMI

item.title: Experimental Measurements And Thermodynamic Modelling Of Aqueous Solubilities, Octanol-Water Partition Coefficients And Vapor Pressures Of Dimethyl Phthalate And Butyl Benzyl Phthalate
Aqueous Solubility, Vapor Pressure And Octanol-Water Partition Coefficient Of Two Phthalate Isomers Dibutyl Phthalate And Di-Isobutyl Phthalate Contaminants Of Recycled Food Packages
